name: briefops
description: Local-first, token-aware persistent work history for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: local-first context priming and continuity for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use BriefOps to prime Codex with compact local context, record task outcomes, review durable memory proposals, and resume persistent workers without hosted services.
defaultPrompt: Start this task with the smallest useful BriefOps context.
Finish this task and prepare memory for the next thread.
